subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of the loved ones of God in the Land of Ṭá, who were not deterred by the censure of critics [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر احباء الله فی ارض الطاء الذین مامنعتهم فی الله لومه
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
